answer_en:
Head of femur located superiorly and directed medially (articulates with acetabulum)
Shaft of femur rough on posterior surface (due to gluteal tuberosity, pectineal line, linea aspera, medial supracondylar line, and lateral supracondylar line)

labels.text: Head of femur located superiorly and directed medially
Shaft of femur rough on posterior surface
labels.note: due to gluteal tuberosity, pectineal line, linea aspera, medial supracondylar line, and lateral supracondylar line

title: Posterior View of Femur (Right Side)
